clauses.text: Licensor hereby grants to Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the Software solely for Licensee's internal business purposes. Licensee shall not sublicense, sell, or transfer the Software to any third party without Licensor's prior written consent.
clauses.difficulty_note: Standard IP license grant with appropriate restrictions

clauses.text: Licensee agrees to pay Licensor license fees as follows: (a) a one-time license fee of $500,000 due upon execution, and (b) annual maintenance and support fees of $100,000 due on each anniversary of the Effective Date. All fees are non-refundable.
clauses.difficulty_note: Non-refundable fees may be excessive; consider refund provisions for early termination

clauses.text: LICENSOR SHALL NOT BE LIABLE TO LICENSEE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, SPECIAL, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THIS AGREEMENT, REGARDLESS OF WHETHER LICENSOR HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.
clauses.difficulty_note: Very broad liability exclusion; conflicts with indemnification obligations elsewhere

clauses.text: Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party from and against any claims, damages, losses, and expenses arising from or related to the indemnifying party's breach of this Agreement, negligence, or violation of applicable laws.
clauses.difficulty_note: Indemnification is broadly worded; should be tied to specific acts

clauses.text: Licensee shall have the right to terminate this Agreement: (a) for convenience upon ninety days prior written notice, (b) immediately upon material breach by Licensor that remains uncured for thirty days after written notice, or (c) immediately if Licensor becomes insolvent or files for bankruptcy.
clauses.difficulty_note: Balanced termination rights for both parties

clauses.text: Licensor shall maintain the following insurance coverages: (a) Commercial General Liability with limits of $2,000,000 per occurrence, (b) Professional Liability/E&O with limits of $5,000,000 per claim, and (c) Workers Compensation as required by law. All policies shall name Licensee as additional insured.
clauses.difficulty_note: Should include carve-out for Licensee's gross negligence

clauses.text: During the term of this Agreement and for a period of two years thereafter, Licensee agrees not to directly or indirectly solicit, hire, or engage any employee or contractor of Licensor who was involved in the performance of this Agreement.
clauses.difficulty_note: Non-solicitation is overly broad; geographic scope unclear

clauses.text: The parties acknowledge that in the course of performing under this Agreement, each party may have access to confidential information of the other party. Each party agrees to protect the other's confidential information using the same degree of care it uses to protect its own confidential information, but in no event less than reasonable care.
clauses.difficulty_note: Reasonable care standard is vague; should define specific safeguards

clauses.text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, and agreements relating to the subject matter hereof. No amendment or modification shall be effective unless in writing and signed by both parties.

Any dispute arising out of or related to this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively by binding arbitration in San Francisco, California, administered by the American Arbitration Association under its Commercial Arbitration Rules. The arbitrator shall have authority to award injunctive relief. Judgment on the award may be entered in any court of competent jurisdiction.
clauses.difficulty_note: Arbitration may disadvantage Licensee; should negotiate neutral location

clauses.text: Licensor warrants that the Software will perform substantially in accordance with the Documentation during the warranty period of ninety days from delivery. This warranty is exclusive and in lieu of all other warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
clauses.difficulty_note: Very limited warranty period; should align with maintenance term

clauses.text: All intellectual property rights in any work product, modifications, or enhancements created by Licensor specifically for Licensee under this Agreement shall be owned by Licensee. Licensor retains all rights in its pre-existing intellectual property and any general know-how used in creating work product.
clauses.difficulty_note: Appropriate IP ownership split; protects both parties
